title: Compact targeted network update
prompt:
In Garry's Mod server Lua, define a load-time pooled net message and a function that sends a state enum 0..7 plus an amount 0..1000 only to the supplied affected-player recipients. Optimize the payload and recipient fanout; do not use a generic table payload.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.
